text:
graded all 6 official MCP reference servers. only one scores above C.

the fetch server has a prompt override baked into its description. the official one. the one everyone copies.

our validator flagged it.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

the sequentialthinking MCP server is 283 tokens.

that's one tool. one description. 283 tokens.

it's the official reference implementation. people are copying it.

git is the surprise — A grade (93.1). clean schema, specific tools, no bloat.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

graded: git A, time B-, memory C+, sequentialthinking C+, fetch C, filesystem D+.

fetch has a prompt override. filesystem gets a D+.

these are the servers the MCP team wrote as examples.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html
